texto: Wildlife is and should be useless in the same way art, music, poetry and even sports are useless. They are useless in the sense that they do nothing more than raise our spirits, make us laugh or cry, frighten, disturb and delight us. They connect us not just to what’s weird, different, other, but to a world where we humans do not matter nearly as much as we like to think.And that should be enough.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Richard Conniff: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Wildlife is and should be useless in the same way art, music, poetry and even sports are useless.…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, nature, wildlife pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de wildlife.
